languages.text: It's similar to the symbols we encountered on the obelisk, it seems like events are constantly repeating themselves, our cogitator helps us understand at what point the events will occur.
languages.translation_comment:
[string] Описание тултипа некронского таймера "It's similar to the symbols we encountered on the obelisk, it seems like events are constantly repeating themselves, our cogitator helps us understand at what point the events will occur."

traits.locale_text: It's similar to the symbols we encountered on the obelisk, it seems like events are constantly repeating themselves, our cogitator helps us understand at what point the events will occur.

languages.text: The cogitator has captured the strange glyphs etched into the xenos obelisk. Their meaning eludes the human mind, but even cursory analysis shows that the symbols mark certain events destined to occur within the gargantuan exhibit, and that they can be used to calculate the time until these inevitable occurrences.
languages.original_text: Когитатор запечатлел чужеродные глифы, высеченные на ксеносском обелиске. Их смысл ускользает от человеческого разума, однако даже поверхностный анализ указывает: эти знаки отмечают грядущие события, коим суждено свершиться в пределах чудовищной экспозиции, и позволяют исчислить срок, оставшийся до их неизбежного наступления.

Их смысл ускользает от человеческого разума, однако даже поверхностный анализ указывает: эти знаки отмечают грядущие события, коим суждено свершиться в пределах чудовищной экспозиции, и позволяют исчислить срок, оставшийся до их неизбежного наступления.

traits.locale_text: Когитатор запечатлел чужеродные глифы, высеченные на ксеносском обелиске. Их смысл ускользает от человеческого разума, однако даже поверхностный анализ указывает: эти знаки отмечают грядущие события, коим суждено свершиться в пределах чудовищной экспозиции, и позволяют исчислить срок, оставшийся до их неизбежного наступления.

languages.text: 思考装置は、異星人の記念碑に刻まれた奇妙な記号を捉えました。その意味は人間の理解を超えていますが、簡単な分析でも、これらの記号が巨大な展示場内で起こる運命の出来事の特定を示していることがわかります。そして、これらの記号を用いることで、これらの避けられない出来事までの時間を計算することができるのです。
languages.original_text: The cogitator has captured the strange glyphs etched into the xenos obelisk. Their meaning eludes the human mind, but even cursory analysis shows that the symbols mark certain events destined to occur within the gargantuan exhibit, and that they can be used to calculate the time until these inevitable occurrences.

traits.locale_text: 思考装置は、異星人の記念碑に刻まれた奇妙な記号を捉えました。その意味は人間の理解を超えていますが、簡単な分析でも、これらの記号が巨大な展示場内で起こる運命の出来事の特定を示していることがわかります。そして、これらの記号を用いることで、これらの避けられない出来事までの時間を計算することができるのです。

languages.text: 沉思者捕捉到了刻在异形方尖碑上的奇怪符号。人类的智识无法参透其中的奥秘，但即便粗略分析也能看出，这些符号标注了某些注定要在巨大展馆内发生的事件，并且可以用它们来推算距离这些必然发生的事还有多长时间。
languages.original_text: The cogitator has captured the strange glyphs etched into the xenos obelisk. Their meaning eludes the human mind, but even cursory analysis shows that the symbols mark certain events destined to occur within the gargantuan exhibit, and that they can be used to calculate the time until these inevitable occurrences.

languages.text: Kavramsayar, zeno dikili taşına kazınmış olan tuhaf glifler kaydetti. Anlamları insan zihninin kavrayışının ötesinde olsa da üstünkörü bir analiz bile sembollerin, muazzam sergi içinde gerçekleşeceği aşikâr olan belirli olayları işaret ettiğini ve bu kaçınılmaz hadiselerin meydana gelmesine kalan süreyi hesaplamak için kullanılabileceğini gösteriyor.
languages.original_text: The cogitator has captured the strange glyphs etched into the xenos obelisk. Their meaning eludes the human mind, but even cursory analysis shows that the symbols mark certain events destined to occur within the gargantuan exhibit, and that they can be used to calculate the time until these inevitable occurrences.

traits.locale_text: Kavramsayar, zeno dikili taşına kazınmış olan tuhaf glifler kaydetti. Anlamları insan zihninin kavrayışının ötesinde olsa da üstünkörü bir analiz bile sembollerin, muazzam sergi içinde gerçekleşeceği aşikâr olan belirli olayları işaret ettiğini ve bu kaçınılmaz hadiselerin meydana gelmesine kalan süreyi hesaplamak için kullanılabileceğini gösteriyor.

Cogitator, xenos dikilitaşına kazınmış garip glifleri yakaladı. Anlamları insan zihnini aşıyor, ancak üstünkörü bir analiz bile sembollerin devasa sergide meydana gelmesi gereken belirli olayları işaret ettiğini ve bu kaçınılmaz olaylara kadar geçen zamanı hesaplamak için kullanılabileceğini gösteriyor.

languages.text: El cogitador ha capturado los extraños glifos tallados en el obelisco xenos. Su significado se escapa a la mente humana, pero un análisis rutinario basta para mostrar que marcan ciertos sucesos destinados a ocurrir en la colosal exposición y sirven para calcular el tiempo entre dichos sucesos inevitables.
languages.original_text: The cogitator has captured the strange glyphs etched into the xenos obelisk. Their meaning eludes the human mind, but even cursory analysis shows that the symbols mark certain events destined to occur within the gargantuan exhibit, and that they can be used to calculate the time until these inevitable occurrences.

traits.locale_text: El cogitador ha capturado los extraños glifos tallados en el obelisco xenos. Su significado se escapa a la mente humana, pero un análisis rutinario basta para mostrar que marcan ciertos sucesos destinados a ocurrir en la colosal exposición y sirven para calcular el tiempo entre dichos sucesos inevitables.

languages.text: Le cogitateur a enregistré les étranges glyphes gravés sur l'obélisque xénos. Leur signification échappe à toute compréhension humaine, mais une analyse rapide permet de comprendre que les symboles font référence à certains événements destinés à se produire dans l'immense exposition, et qu'ils peuvent servir à calculer le temps restant avant que lesdits événements ne surviennent.
languages.original_text: The cogitator has captured the strange glyphs etched into the xenos obelisk. Their meaning eludes the human mind, but even cursory analysis shows that the symbols mark certain events destined to occur within the gargantuan exhibit, and that they can be used to calculate the time until these inevitable occurrences.

traits.locale_text: Le cogitateur a enregistré les étranges glyphes gravés sur l'obélisque xénos. Leur signification échappe à toute compréhension humaine, mais une analyse rapide permet de comprendre que les symboles font référence à certains événements destinés à se produire dans l'immense exposition, et qu'ils peuvent servir à calculer le temps restant avant que lesdits événements ne surviennent.

languages.text: Der Cogitator hat die seltsamen, in den Xenos-Obelisken gemeißelten Glyphen erfasst. Ihre Bedeutung entzieht sich dem menschlichen Verstand, aber selbst eine flüchtige Analyse zeigt, dass die Symbole bestimmte Ereignisse innerhalb des riesigen Exponats markieren und die Berechnung der Zeit bis zum Eintritt besagter Ereignisse ermöglichen.
